forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely in the evening. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the Barossa Valley in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the Barossa Valley in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the Barossa Valley in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely in the evening. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the north in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the north, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely in the evening. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the north, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day then tending southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Light winds.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeasterly in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Light winds.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 26.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then tending southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds east to northeasterly and light increasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 26.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, becoming less likely in the evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the evening.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely later this evening. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast in the morning and early afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain east of Coober Pedy, high chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding north of Coober Pedy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. High chance of showers east of Stuart Highway, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Coober Pedy. Thunderstorms possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding north of Marla in the early morning. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 11 [Extreme]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain west of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding west of Leigh Creek. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Leigh Creek, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Winds northeast to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 24 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 29.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 11 [Extreme]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain in the far northeast, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Leigh Creek in the morning and afternoon. Winds northeast to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 33.
